basic_details.job_title: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 8 July 2026 on the official website of the Central University of Odisha (https://cuo.ac.in). A total of 4 Guest Faculty vacancies have been announced through the Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject, NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or Ph.D or SLET/SET accredited by UGC
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Economics): Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in Economics or allied subject from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET. Guest Faculty (Anthropology - Archaeological): Master's degree in Anthropology with specialization in Archaeological Anthropology with 55% marks (or equivalent) from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET. Guest Faculty (Anthropology - Social/Biological): Master's degree in Anthropology with specialization in Social/Biological Anthropology with 55% marks (or equivalent) from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET.

salary_details.guest faculty (economics): Rs. 1500/- per lecture (max Rs. 50,000/- per month)
salary_details.guest faculty (anthropology - archaeolog: Rs. 1500/- per lecture (max Rs. 50,000/- per month)
salary_details.guest faculty (anthropology - social/bio: Rs. 1500/- per lecture (max Rs. 50,000/- per month)

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.central_university_of_odisha: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject, NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or Ph.D or SLET/SET accredited by UGC

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Central University of Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty - Economics Job 2026 Notification PDF Download Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty - Anthropology Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty (Economics): Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in Economics or allied subject from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET. Guest Faculty (Anthropology - Archaeological): Master's degree in Anthropology with specialization in Archaeological Anthropology with 55% marks (or equivalent) from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET. Guest Faculty (Anthropology - Social/Biological): Master's degree in Anthropology with specialization in Social/Biological Anthropology with 55% marks (or equivalent) from Indian University or equivalent from foreign University; NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend

rows.salary: Rs. 1500/- per lecture (max Rs. 50,000/- per month)

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Central University of Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Guest Faculty posts at Central University of Odisha?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty positions at the Central University of Odisha.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1500/- per lecture with a maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned subject, along with NET/CSIR NET/Ph.D/SLET/SET.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, and other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Central University of Odisha located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Odisha is located in Koraput, Odisha, with the pincode 763004.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, so candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.
